headline: Fifth Third (FITB) Launches AI-Powered Mobile App Interface
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (NYSE:FITB) is one of the best stocks to invest in under $100. On June 17, Fifth Third announced the launch of an AI-powered interface within its mobile app, designed to streamline navigation and task completion for customers.
